symptoms: ImportError: TorchCodec is required for load_with_torchcodec. Please install torchcodec to use this function.

evidence.detail: Attempt 2 reached torchaudio.load() during compute_similarity and failed because torchaudio 2.11.0 required torchcodec.
The repo documents an older PyTorch/torchaudio family, which is closer to the successful 2.1.2 pin than to 2.11.0.
After pinning torch==2.1.2 and torchaudio==2.1.2, the same infer path completed successfully.

diagnosis: The phase-1 path itself was correct after the lazy-import patch; the remaining blocker was a newer torchaudio runtime family that changed audio loading behavior on this host.
